{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (non-convex hard-selection objective) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors (rate claims) and harmful content (bandit vs. full-info framing mismatch).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (non-convex hard-selection objective) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (rate claims) and harmful content (bandit vs. full-info framing mismatch).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
